meta.title: DEF CON 33 - BiC Village - Petty Proteins When Molecules Go Rogue& Why Cyberbiosecurity - Tia Pope
meta.description: Explore how AI-designed proteins and biological misbehavior mirror cybersecurity threats—and why we need diverse cyberbiosecurity defenders.
